title: malva tenuicalyx
intro: Malva tenuicalyx, also known as the dwarf mallow or small-leaved mallow, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Malva tenuicalyx include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and aiding in wound healing. Malva tenuicalyx can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies.
